name: Improper Neutralization of Multiple Internal Special Elements
description: The product does not properly neutralize multiple consecutive internal special characters in user input, where the repetition may have different semantics than a single instance, allowing attackers to bypass filters or alter downstream parsing.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides data with multiple consecutive internal special characters that flows to TRANSFORM[parser] without a TRANSFORM[normalize_internal] that collapses or escapes repeated internal special elements before parsing
